vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:deft-directive-swarm
vBRIEFInfo.description: migrate:vbrief routes scope vBRIEFs to correct lifecycle folder based on reconciled status per #506 conventions.

plan.title: migrate:vbrief lifecycle folder routing per reconciled status (#499)

narratives.Overview: Migrator chooses lifecycle folder per scope based on reconciled source state (consuming #496 output). Uses schema-native status vocabulary: draft|proposed|approved|pending|running|completed|blocked|cancelled. NEVER 'in_progress' (#499 correction comment is authoritative, confirmed in #506).
narratives.Problem: Current migrator dumps all scope vBRIEFs into pending/ regardless of completion state. plan.items[*].status in PROJECT-DEFINITION.vbrief.json defaults to pending and disagrees with specification.vbrief.json subItems. Lifecycle-folder convention meaningless immediately post-migration.
narratives.Action: Edit scripts/migrate_vbrief.py to route scope vBRIEFs per #506 lifecycle-folder mapping: proposed/ <-> draft|proposed; pending/ <-> approved|pending; active/ <-> running|blocked; completed/ <-> completed; cancelled/ <-> cancelled. Use reconciled status from #496. Mirror status into PROJECT-DEFINITION.vbrief.json plan.items[*].status. Orphan ROADMAP items -> proposed/ with SourceConflict narrative.
narratives.Test: Synthetic fixtures covering all five routing cases: [done] in SPEC -> completed/; in-progress/running -> active/; cancelled -> cancelled/; orphan ROADMAP -> proposed/ with SourceConflict; default -> pending/. Assert plan.status in each scope vBRIEF matches folder per mapping. Assert plan.items[*].status in PROJECT-DEFINITION matches scope status.
narratives.Outcome: Lifecycle folder routing is status-driven and schema-consistent. Never emits 'in_progress'. PROJECT-DEFINITION registry agrees with scope vBRIEFs.

items.title: Follow directive guidelines: AGENTS.md, deft/main.md, deft/QUICK-START.md, conventional commits, task check before commit
Use schema vocabulary only: running (NOT in_progress); match #506 lifecycle<->status mapping
[done] in SPEC or ROADMAP Completed -> completed/, plan.status=completed
Orphan ROADMAP items -> proposed/, plan.status=proposed, narrative.SourceConflict set
Default -> pending/, plan.status=pending (only when no completion signal)
Synthetic fixture tests cover all five routing cases + registry mirror
